post.description: This endpoint performs a full hard upsert of all products. Existing products are updated (including images with fresh tokens), new products are added. NO DATA IS DELETED. Perfect for refreshing expired image tokens.

201.description: Hard upsert completed successfully with detailed statistics.

500.description: Internal server error during hard upsert.

post.summary: Run hard upsert of all Toptex products (updates existing, keeps data, refreshes images with fresh tokens)

Trigger deleted-items sync (admin only)

Get the status of the last upsert and deleted sync runs (admin only)

post.summary: Create a new address for the current user

200.description: List of addresses belonging to the current user

get.summary: Get all addresses of the current user

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Adds a SKU to the logged-in user's cart. If the item already exists in the cart, its quantity is incremented. Stock availability and SKU sale state are validated before adding.

201.description: Item added. Returns the full updated cart.

post.summary: Add an item to the cart

get.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Returns the full cart for the logged-in user, including all items, SKU details, product images, and per-item pricing.

200.description: Returns the full cart with all items and totals.

get.summary: Get the current user's cart

delete.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Removes every item from the logged-in user's cart in one operation.
delete.summary: Clear all items from the cart

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Called immediately after login to merge the locally-stored guest cart into the user's server-side cart. Duplicate items are merged by summing their quantities.

201.description: Cart merged. Returns the full merged cart.

post.summary: Merge guest cart into user cart after login

get.description: 🔴 **Admin only.** Returns a paginated list of all user carts across the platform, including owner info and item counts.

200.description: Paginated list of carts with user info and totals.

403.description: Authenticated user is not an admin.

get.summary: [Admin] Get paginated list of all carts

get.description: 🔴 **Admin only.** Retrieves the full cart for any user by their ID, including all items and pricing.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user whose cart to retrieve

200.description: Returns the user's full cart with all items and pricing.

403.description: Authenticated user is not an admin.

get.summary: [Admin] Get a specific user's cart

patch.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Updates the quantity of a specific SKU already in the cart. Stock availability is re-validated against the new quantity.

parameters.name: skuId
parameters.description: SKU ID of the cart item to update

200.description: Cart item updated. Returns the full updated cart.

patch.summary: Update quantity of a cart item

delete.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Removes a specific SKU from the logged-in user's cart entirely, regardless of quantity.

parameters.name: skuId
parameters.description: SKU ID of the item to remove

200.description: Item removed. Returns the full updated cart.

delete.summary: Remove an item from the cart

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Creates a new order from the current user's cart and forwards it to Toptex. --- ### ⚠️ Required body field: `testMode` You **must** send `testMode` in the request body: | Value | Effect | |-------|--------| | `true` | Sends a **TEST** order to Toptex — no real fulfillment, safe for development | | `false` | Sends a **REAL** order to Toptex — triggers actual production fulfillment | **Example body:** ```json {
: false } ``` --- Also requires: a default delivery address and at least one item in the cart.

testMode.description: ⚠️ REQUIRED. true = test order sent to Toptex (no real fulfillment). false = real production order.

201.description: Order created and forwarded to Toptex.

400.description: Cart is empty / item unavailable / out of stock / no delivery address.

post.summary: Place an order from the cart

post.description: 🔒 **Admin only.** Forwards an existing order to the Toptex API. --- ### ⚠️ Required body field: `testMode` You **must** send `testMode` in the request body: | Value | Effect | |-------|--------| | `true` | Sends a **TEST** order to Toptex — no real fulfillment, safe for development | | `false` | Sends a **REAL** order to Toptex — triggers actual production fulfillment | **Example body:** ```json {
: false } ``` --- Will fail if the order has already been forwarded to Toptex.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal order ID to forward.

testMode.description: ⚠️ REQUIRED. true = test order sent to Toptex (no real fulfillment). false = real production order.

400.description: Order already forwarded / no delivery address.

post.summary: Manually forward an order to Toptex

post.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for the given order. The order must belong to the authenticated user and must not already be paid. Returns a `clientSecret` to be used on the frontend to confirm the payment with Stripe.js.

orderId.description: UUID of the order to pay for

clientSecret.description: Stripe client secret — pass this to stripe.confirmCardPayment() on the frontend

post.summary: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for an order

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Verifies the `stripe-signature` header and processes `payment_intent.succeeded` to mark the order as paid and forward it to Toptex. **Do not call this endpoint manually** — it is intended for Stripe only.

parameters.name: stripe-signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature (set automatically by Stripe)

400.description: Invalid Stripe signature or malformed payload

post.summary: Stripe webhook endpoint

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Creates a new review for a product. Each user can only submit **one review per product**. Rating must be between 1 and 5.

409.description: You have already reviewed this product.

post.summary: Submit a review for a product

get.description: 🔴 **Admin only.** Returns every review across all products and users, ordered by most recent first. Includes reviewer info and product reference.

200.description: Full list of all reviews, newest first.

403.description: Authenticated user is not an admin.

get.summary: [Admin] Get all reviews

get.description: 🌐 **Public — no authentication required.** Returns all approved reviews for a given product, ordered by most recent first. Includes reviewer first and last name.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to fetch reviews for

200.description: List of reviews for the product, newest first.

get.summary: Get all reviews for a product

patch.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only — owner only.** Allows a user to edit the rating or comment of a review they previously submitted. Users cannot edit reviews that belong to other users.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the review to update

comment.example: Updated — even better than I thought!

403.description: You can only edit your own reviews.

delete.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users — owner or admin.** Deletes a review by ID. - **Regular users** can only delete their own reviews. - **Admins** can delete any review regardless of ownership.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the review to delete

403.description: You can only delete your own reviews.

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Adds a product to the current user's wishlist. Each product can only appear **once** per user.
post.summary: Add a product to the wishlist

get.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Returns all products in the current user's wishlist, ordered by most recently added.
get.summary: Get all wishlist items

delete.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Removes all products from the current user's wishlist.
🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Removes a specific product from the current user's wishlist.
delete.summary: Remove a product from the wishlist

post.description: 🔒 **Authenticated users only.** Merges an array of product IDs into the current user's wishlist. Duplicates are silently skipped.
post.summary: Merge local wishlist into server wishlist

info.title: Koletex API
info.description: Koletex ecommerce API with TopTex integration

idToken.description: Google ID token received from the frontend after Google sign-in

continue.description: Whether to continue from a previous sync page. If false, wipes all data.

page.description: The page number to continue from. Required if continue is true.

modifiedSince.description: Only sync products modified since this date (e.g.

deletedSince.description: Only fetch items deleted since this date (e.g.
